# Transcrição: 01-Introduction

## [00:00 - 00:57]

Hey, Grant Cardone here. Welcome back to week two of the program. Look at this point, you're still working on one blueprint for finding and attracting quality deal flow. This week, however, Brandon and his team will focus specifically on vetting the businesses that you've met with and start helping you negotiate that deal. You'll be requesting information from the sellers that you've already met with and have now signed an NDA with. Then you'll be reviewing that information with your deal team and making sure that the seller and their business is a quality candidate for what you're trying to do. Look, if they are, we'll dig into sending your LOIs, letters of intent, and eventually getting out an offer letter. You're making awesome progress so far, so stick to the plan. Keep doing the work. If you haven't done this, go back and get it done. But let's get started. Brandon's waiting for you in the next lesson. Let's go.
